subject: Status review: meeting milestone in Auckland | Frida Kahlo | Q4 review | INIT-0561
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of meeting work in Auckland. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. Comparative note includes Frida Kahlo and Nikola Tesla as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-0561. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: handoff, readiness.
